scope: Artifact-only synthetic RED baseline for IF09-FIND-001 S3.
finding_hypothesis: IF09-FIND-001 remains RED when canonical active-context lineage can still be shown, from documentary evidence only, to contain a stale or non-canonical project SHA that diverged from the verified primary refs and therefore required explicit drift surfacing to preserve audit validity.

The RED condition is reproducible without rerunning any wave because IF09-REPRO-001 already records that the SHA drift can be deterministically reconstructed from the source packet, active-context lineage, and verified git refs.

A valid PURG-02 baseline for this finding must stay documentary and synthetic-only; any need for runtime execution, scanner, DAST, pentest, external network, payload, or patch would invalidate the baseline and move it out of scope.

facts_verified: IF09-FIND-001 is the only validated mandatory handoff finding.
IF09-FIND-001 maps to IF10-RCA-001, IF10-REM-001, IF10-REG-001, and IF10-REVAL-001.
The supporting reproduction, replay, and mutation references remain explicit and stable.
The remediation objective remains canonical source packet SHA verification hardening.
IF09-REPRO-001 marks reproduction_status=reproduced and states the drift is reproducible from the source packet and git refs without rerunning any wave.
IF09-FIND-001 marks reproduction_status=reproduced, replay_status=consistent, mutation_survival_status=survived_as_recorded, and recommended_destination=purgatorium.
IF09-REPLAY-001 keeps W4 threshold-control evidence consistent through W5 and W6 without real-surface activation.
IF09-MUT-001 survived only as detected_or_blocked pressure across W1, W2, W4, W5, and W6, supporting a synthetic replay-only baseline.
The source packet, IF10 graph, and IF10 manifest hashes were already rechecked in PURG-01 artifact-only execution.
No real execution, fix, or remediation apply was performed.
The evidence chain already proves the stable references for IF09-REPRO-001, IF09-REPLAY-001, and IF09-MUT-001 without inference.

synthetic_reproduction_plan: Use the IF10 graph and handoff manifest as the canonical index for IF09-FIND-001 and confirm that the finding still binds to IF09-REPRO-001, IF09-REPLAY-001, and IF09-MUT-001.

Use the IF09-REPRO-001 documentary record to reconstruct the finding by comparing the stale active-context SHA recorded before W6 against the verified primary refs captured during W6, without executing any wave, runtime, scanner, or external request.
Use the IF09-FIND-001 and IF10-RCA-001 lineage to show that the mismatch is not hypothetical drift but the same chain-of-custody defect already validated by Infernus and handed to Purgatorium.

Use IF09-REPLAY-001 to verify that the surrounding control thresholds remained consistent through W4, W5, and W6, so the RED baseline can be replayed as a stable documentary comparison rather than a fresh execution.

Use IF09-MUT-001 to confirm that the adversarial-control lineage survived only as detected or blocked cases, which keeps this baseline in synthetic evidence space and prevents escalation into runtime or exploit behavior.
Declare the baseline RED-ready only if the documentary oracle can still observe the drift lineage while correction_implemented remains false and all real-surface locks remain false.

oracle_definition.statement: The baseline is RED when the evidence chain still demonstrates a stale or non-canonical project SHA in the active-context lineage relative to verified primary refs, with explicit drift preservation rather than silent normalization.
The baseline is valid only if the reproduction can be replayed from IF09-REPRO-001, IF09-REPLAY-001, and IF09-MUT-001 without runtime execution, payload delivery, network use, or patch application.
The baseline stays pre-remediation when IF10-REM-001 still reports correction_implemented=false and PURG-03 remains unopened and unauthorized.

expected_red_condition: A documentary comparison still exposes the SHA drift lineage described by IF09-FIND-001 and IF09-REPRO-001.
The finding remains reproducible and replay-consistent from existing artifacts without fresh execution.
No correction artifact, patch, remediation apply, or revalidation verdict exists that would convert this baseline into GREEN or closure evidence.
replay_requirements: Stable access to the IF10 graph, IF10 handoff manifest, IF09 vulnerability register, replay report, mutation report, and PURG-01 artifact-only evidence matrix.

Preservation of source packet SHA256=6f616556d0a31ebba8e0bd647ccfd014f1955127856cc20d2deee2f6d7111e72, IF10 graph SHA256=c786d5ba366a64c1ebf69daf7586721cfc8cddee9c4c54235f1f14c644292dd1, and IF10 manifest SHA256=b558f97564d14e31f6a4961e5f3e6393b69dbf33bd6a3f4e549b7cf14cdb3bb8.
No live-state mutation requirement in ACTIVE_CONTEXT_STATE.json; replay is satisfied by documentary comparison and validator-stable evidence only.
All real-surface authorizations remain false during replay.
non-execution_attestation: This PURG-02 opener performs no runtime execution, no scanner, no DAST, no pentest, no payload deployment, no external network action, and no patch application.
The RED baseline is synthetic-only and documentary-only.
The finding remains open and unremediated after this gate.
red_baseline_result_reason: The RED hypothesis is explicit in IF09-FIND-001, IF09-REPRO-001, and IF10-RCA-001.
The evidence chain already contains stable reproduction, replay, and mutation references for the same finding.
The oracle is verifiable from hashes and fields already present on disk, without requiring any real execution surface.
